reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The output JSON is missing several complete pages from the source presentation. Specifically, the text content of Page 9 ('Campaign Airings'), Page 14 ('URLs Accessed from the Recruitment Webpage'), and Page 15 ('Spectrum Reach and Website Analytics') is entirely absent from the conversion result. While there is a token-saving omission marker early in the document (between Pages 3 and 4), there are no such markers between Page 13 (ending at element 113) and Page 16 (starting at element 122), nor
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 9 text: 'Campaign Airings', 'Paid airings – 6,387 commercials', etc.; Page 14 text: 'URLs Accessed from the Recruitment Webpage', '1,726 Total Clicks to another website', etc.; Page 15 text: 'Spectrum Reach and Website Analytics', 'Organic Search drove 57.8% of the overall sessions during this time', etc.
concerns.output_quote: The text content for these pages is missing from the elements list. For example, between element 113 (Page 13) and element 122 (Page 16), there is no content for Pages 14 and 15.

concerns.analysis: Several meaningful images from the source PDF are missing in the HTML output. Specifically, the map on slide 4 (page 8), the network logo cloud on slide 5 (page 9), and several analytical charts and graphs from the Google Data Studio screenshots (pages 10, 11, and 12) are absent. While some data from the dashboards has been extracted into tables, the visual charts (line graphs, pie charts, bar charts) that provide trend information are missing.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains a map on page 8, a logo cloud image on page 9, a line graph and pie chart on page 10, a bar chart on page 11, and a pie chart on page 12.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML sections corresponding to pages 8, 9, 10, 11, and 12 are missing the aforementioned map, logo cloud, and analytical charts/graphs.
concerns.location: Sections: Durham (RLDU) Zone - 0664, Campaign Airings, Webpage Analytics: Site Summary, Webpage Analytics: Engagement, Website Analytics: Top 20 Cities out of the 453 Sessions

concerns.analysis: Several numbered lists in the source document were incorrectly converted to unordered lists in the JSON output. This resulted in the loss of the numbering characters (e.g., '1.', '2.', etc.) from the text of the list items. This occurs in the Agenda (page 2), Minutes (pages 3 and 4), and the ROI slide (page 17).
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Numbered list items on page 2 (1. Chair Opening Remarks...), page 3 (4. Approval of July Minutes..., 8. Community College Partnership...), page 4 (9. Committee Goals...), and page 17 (1. Increase in Number of Applications...).
concerns.output_quote: The corresponding elements are marked as "list_type": "unordered" and the numbering text is missing from the item content.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
